scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('public')) fs.rmSync('public', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.cpSync('client/dist', 'public', {recursive:true});"
